Golden hour sun backlights translucent wave crests with amber fire, long shadows stretching across rolling swells.
Storm light breaks through dark clouds in dramatic silver shafts, illuminating rain-lashed churning gray seas below.
Lightning flash freezes white foam on black ocean surface, thunder-split sky glowing electric purple momentarily.
Full moon casts silver path across dark calm water, lunar glow painting wet coastal rocks blue-white.
Pre-dawn violet twilight suffuses glassy ocean surface, stars fading as eastern horizon begins pale warming.
First sunrise rays pierce dense sea mist, rose-gold shafts creating ethereal columns above silhouetted swells.
Pink-orange dawn horizon line sharp against navy water, mirror-calm surface reflecting pastel gradient sky perfectly.
Deep purple-blue twilight descends over still harbor, last golden rim of sun vanishing below western edge.
Indigo dusk afterglow silhouettes wave faces, dying light catching foam streaks in final amber highlights.
Heavy pewter overcast sky merges with slate-gray sea, monochrome seascape broken by distant white wave crests.
Thick marine fog diffuses world to pearl-white glow, hazy sun disk barely visible through moisture-laden air.
Bright crack of golden light splits dark storm clouds at horizon, illuminating single patch of green-gray ocean.
Harsh equatorial noon sun bleaches tropical shallows white-turquoise, high contrast shadows under cloudless sky.
Low arctic sun skims polar horizon orange-pink, ice floes reflecting copper light across dark frigid water.
Aurora borealis shimmers green curtains above black arctic ocean, northern lights dancing on wave-rippled surface.
Midnight sun grazes Norwegian Sea golden-bronze, perpetual twilight casting surreal warm glow on cold waters.
Rainbow arcs across clearing sky after squall, brilliant colors spanning from dark clouds to sunlit foam.
Green storm light suffuses ocean before tornado, eerie chartreuse glow under rotating wall cloud above swells.
Waterspout connects black thundercloud to churning sea, late afternoon sun backlighting the spinning gray column.
Hailstones pepper dark ocean surface white, heavy clouds above releasing ice while distant horizon glows yellow.
Copper-red sunrise ignites breaking wave spray into glittering mist, backlit droplets suspended like molten metal.
Blue hour wraps coastal rocks in cool sapphire light, bioluminescent foam glowing faint green in shadows.
Wildfire smoke filters sunset to blood-orange disk, apocalyptic red light staining wave faces and sea smoke.
Brilliant white sun breaks winter storm, slate ocean suddenly diamond-sparkled, contrast painful after gray dawn.
Green flash flickers at sunset's final moment, rare emerald glimpse as sun sinks below razor-sharp horizon.
